name: adjudant
description: Obsidian vault editor/writer and project initializer. One command, /adjudant, with ten verbs — connect, port, sync, check, sitrep, tidy, ramasse, dream, draw, board — each backed by a stdlib-only Python helper that follows the .claude/adjudant breadcrumb to the vault (cross-machine via vault_name fallback and OB_VAULT). Locked three-tier cleanup model: tidy (surface mechanical, routine), ramasse (deep structural, sparing), dream (semantic content/knowledge refresh, judgment-heavy). draw creates canvases, bases, and mermaid diagrams — hand-authored or generated from vault data; board scaffolds a self-hosted drag-to-move kanban seeded from tasks/. Five vault-aware hooks keep session notes and a freshness-headed handoff current; vault standards are schema-enforced and drift-guarded by pre-commit validators. Pairs with hookify and Gemineye.
